value.label: 1) There are at least two co-promotions with hisense each year, and it is willing to reduce its gross margin by at least 5% or more
2) There are more than two co-promotions with hisense each year, and it is willing to reduce its gross margin by at least2% to 5%
3) There are 1-2 co-promotions with hisense every year, and it is willing to reduce its gross margin by at least 1%-1.9%
4) No co-promotions, and each promotion is determined by hisense
